chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Revision Application No.66 of 2020 Date Order with Signature of Judge Priority 1. For order on office objection 2. For hearing of CMA No.2137/2020 3. For hearing of main case 09.03.2026 Dr. Adil Abid, Advocate for the applicants. Mr. Anwar Kamal, Advocate for the respondent a/w Ms. Mah Jabeen Advocate. -------------------------------- Counsel for the applicants and respondent are at ad idem that this matter has been settled out of the Court. The applicants no longer wish to press this lis and seek its withdrawal. Both counsel contend that they are duly authorized to withdraw and / or give consent / no objection to such withdrawal pursuant to the vakalatnamas available on record as the case may be. Accordingly this revision application is disposed of in the above terms alongwith listed application. JUDGE Asif
